meta.title: Thank You | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Thank you for contacting Prayaan Capital. We will be in touch shortly.

sections.headline: Thank You!
sections.subheadline: We've received your submission and will be in touch within 24 hours.

bullets.title: Within 24 hours
bullets.body: A relationship manager will call you on your registered mobile number.

bullets.title: Document Collection
bullets.body: Our team will guide you through the document submission process.

bullets.title: Credit Decision
bullets.body: Loan sanction or decline communicated in writing.

sections.headline: While You Wait
sections.subheadline: Calculate your EMI or read about our loan products.
